text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...It's starting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega mutters next to me. Then, a roar of
cheers fill the air.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
First up is number seven, T.M. Opera O! She's the
clear favorite with her insurmountable number of
fans!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Looks like a bump's starting to swell where she hit
her head just moments ago. But that won't be a
problem for her. She's as strong as a rock!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What did she get herself into this time?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And who comes to mind when you think of T.M.
Opera O? It's Meisho Doto, number thirteen! Will
our second most popular contender finally
achieve victory?!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Her skills sure have been improving at an
incredible rate. Will she be able to best the
Overlord?! Make sure you keep your eyes on her!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Why can't she keep her chin up? Listen to how
well they're talking about her.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And finally, it's the Umamusume you've all been
waiting for!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I'm Narita Top Road! I'll try my best to win your
support!

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fans
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fan A
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, Top Road! It's Top Roooad!

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fan B
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Aw! I'm so glad you're running in the Arima Kinen! I know you can do it!

text_block_list.name: Top Road Fans
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Listen to those cheers! Number four, Narita Top
Road, is our third most popular!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
She may have missed the Japan Cup, but her
indomitable go-getter attitude makes you want
to cheer her on! I have high hopes for her!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Let's head to the stands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the Arima Kinen gets underway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O pushes up to first place from
eleventh by a nose after crossing through a
persistent pack in the final stretch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd goes wild at the Opera Overlord's
display of fierce determination. Her rival, Meisho
Doto, makes it to second place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And finally... Narita Top Road takes ninth place.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: ...I lost!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I know, I saw it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... um... Sorry, that was embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
But, well, I'm still growing and improving, so it's
fine.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
So I'm bound to keep embarrassing myself as I
struggle and struggle—as I keep trying my
hardest... harder than anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep going until the day I can beat Opera O,
Doto, and you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I won't let my fans down! Because I'm Narita Top
Road!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
If you're going to be like that, then let me say
something too.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Rise up... and meet my expectations.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! I will!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As the Arima Kinen draws to a close, so too does
the year... and a new season begins.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, y-yes... um... Opera O?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Our era is nowhere near over.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That goes for all of us—you, Ayabe, myself...
even Top Road.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Let's compete again, as many times
countable—for we are an unending quartet!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The radiance of our four stars will shine bright,
even in the light of day.
